markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and technical improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Page structure issues identified: H1 placement and unnecessary headings affecting indexing](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Content refresh strategy showing promising results: 3x increase in impressions for updated articles](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [New content facing indexing challenges: \~1/3 of recently published articles not yet indexed](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Overall blog performance declining slightly; GrowthX content contributing \~3.5% of total blog clicks](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

## Topics

### Page Structure Optimization

  - [Current issue: H1 buried, multiple unnecessary H2s at top](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [Ideal structure: H1 at top, followed by relevant H2s-H4s](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Action: Jorge (web admin) to be involved in implementing fixes](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Potential impact: May resolve mobile indexing issues and improve overall site performance](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [GrowthX content: 24 clicks, 1100 impressions, 2.1% CTR (vs 0.6% overall blog CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Content refresh strategy: Showing 3x increase in impressions for updated low-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Indexing challenges: \~1/3 of recently published articles not indexed after a month](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)

### SEO Strategy Discussion

  - [Shopify-related keywords: Challenging due to Shopify's high domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Suggestion to continue including Shopify keywords (5-10% of articles) despite difficulties](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Focus on backlinking to Firework's Shopify app to improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Metrics and Reporting

  - [Request to include on-page metrics (time on page, bounce rate) in future reports](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Suggestion to use Google Analytics (connected to Search Console) for comprehensive metrics](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Agreement not to benchmark against previous non-marketing team's blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Current referring domains: \~2,000 (400 less than competitors)](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [GrowthX perspective: Technical SEO more crucial than backlinks at this stage](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Backlinks become more important for highly competitive keywords and scaling traffic](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Add Jorge (web admin) to future meetings for direct communication on technical changes](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Implement page structure fixes ASAP, coordinated between GrowthX and Jorge](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more detailed on-page metrics for their published content](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Continue content refresh strategy alongside new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Explore Google Analytics data for more comprehensive performance insights](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Monitor indexing improvements after implementing technical SEO changes](https://fathom.video/share/3p38P7sGHZQJyE25HCweiF1TxjP4X5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
